mapper.select:
select notice_id as noticeId, receiver_type as receiverType, receiver_label as receiverLabel, notice_title as noticeTitle, notice_content as noticeContent, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from osg_notice
and receiver_type = #{receiverType}
and notice_title like concat('%', #{noticeTitle}, '%')
order by create_time desc, notice_id desc
mapper.insert: insert into osg_notice ( receiver_type, receiver_label, notice_title, notice_content, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{receiverType}, #{receiverLabel}, #{noticeTitle}, #{noticeContent}, #{createTime}, now() )
